home.noConnectionBody: Configure Supabase (see .env.example) and apply the migrations.

notFound.title: Not found
notFound.body: The page or round you are looking for does not exist.

login.title: Organizers access
login.subtitle: Only the club organizers have a login (Supabase Auth).
login.inviteError: We couldn't validate the invitation (it may have expired). Ask for a new one.

admin.title: Organizers
admin.noClubs: You don't belong to any club yet — create one.

adminClub.organizersHelp: Add organizers by email: existing accounts are linked to the club; otherwise an invitation is sent.

adminCompetition.lifecycleHelp: draft and closed are hidden from the public; transitions are free.
adminCompetition.phasesHelp: Assign rounds to a phase (same number = same phase, shown as Phase A, B…). Several rounds sharing the same phase are ranked together: their results are aggregated into one combined standing for that phase.
adminCompetition.deleteCompetitionHelp: Deletes this competition and, in cascade, all its rounds, lots, pairs, scorecards, photos and claims. This cannot be undone.
adminCompetition.confirmDeleteCompetition: I confirm I want to delete this competition and all its data
adminCompetition.sectorsHelp: Competition sector catalog (reusable labels; may be composite like "17/18/19").
adminCompetition.lotsHelp: Define the lot numbers; the draw then assigns each lot to an angler (individual) or a pair (pairs). The per-round pattern (fish/control + sector) is set on each round.

adminRound.rosterHelp: Operational table: one scorecard (plica) per angler and round.
adminRound.rosterRoleHelp: Define each lot's role in this round: it fishes a sector, or controls another lot. Roles invert between the rounds of a phase.
adminRound.scorecardHelp: Manual: sizes in cm separated by commas. Or process an AI reading (mock) to exercise the validation + HITL queue flow.
adminRound.scorecardHelpReal: Real plica format: upload the photo, pick the lot and controller, then enter measures (one per line: size quantity) and the undersized count. Or process an AI reading (mock).
adminRound.author: Author (lot/name)
adminRound.deleteRoundHelp: Deletes this round and, in cascade, its sectors, entries, scorecards and photos. This cannot be undone.
adminRound.confirmDeleteRound: I confirm I want to delete this round and all its data
adminRound.finalLocked: The round is final — it cannot be edited or deleted.
adminRound.whatsappHelp: Inbound scorecard photos sent to the club's WhatsApp number are attached to the active round. Only one round per competition can be active.
adminRound.sectorsManagedHelp: Sectors are managed on the competition (reusable catalog).
adminRound.noSectorsRound: No sectors defined on the competition.

scorecard.immutable: The round is final — the scorecard is immutable.

issue.signalsMismatch: Catch {index}: the marks ({tens}{units}) do not agree with the handwritten size ({size}).
issue.legalCatchesMismatch: Legal catches: I read {read} but the total says {total}.
issue.undersizedMismatch: Undersized catches: I read {read} but the total says {total}.
issue.biggestCatchMismatch: Biggest catch: I read {read} cm but the total says {total} cm.
issue.lotNotInRoster: Lot {lot} is not in the round roster.
issue.memberUnresolved: Lot {lot}: couldn't tell which pair member this plica belongs to; assign it manually.

accept.title: Finish your access
accept.subtitle: Set a password for {email} and start organizing.
accept.subtitleNoSession: Open the link from your invitation email to continue.
